embeds.description: Bluewil Guide from: strawberry (This guide assumes you have E1+)  Introduction Bluewil = tawil + blue = draw from blue card on exalt Tawil + battle = 20 cards/turn Tawil + Tawil wheel = happy Tawil E2 Tawil = happy Tawil Hameln = happy tawil Please make her happy  The comp I will go over the ve...
